description: Explore, edit SCL/STL, and compile Siemens TIA Portal projects from VS Code via T-IA Connect REST API
config.title: T-IA Connect
config.autoReimportOnSave.description: Automatically reimport SCL/STL blocks into TIA Portal on save
config.autoCompileOnReimport.description: Automatically compile after reimporting a block
config.autoSaveInterval.description: Auto-save interval for open block files (in minutes). This is a safety backup — reimport to TIA only happens on manual Ctrl+S.
config.executablePath.description: Path to the T-IA Connect server executable. Used to launch the server when it is not running.
welcome.serverNotRunning:
T-IA Connect server is not running.

Launch the server and connect automatically:
[Launch Headless](command:tiaConnect.launchHeadless)
[Launch with GUI](command:tiaConnect.launchGui)

Or connect to an already running server:
[Connect to Server](command:tiaConnect.connect)
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22tiaConnect%22)
welcome.notConnected:
No connection to T-IA Connect server.

Make sure the T-IA Connect server is running, then click Connect.
[Connect to Server](command:tiaConnect.connect)

You can configure the server URL and API key in the extension settings.
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22tiaConnect%22)
welcome.noProject:
Connected but no project found.

Open a TIA Portal project in T-IA Connect, then refresh.
[Refresh](command:tiaConnect.refreshProject)
